ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the campaign was created */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "content_strategy" TEXT /* Content strategy for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the post is related to */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user who posted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the post */,
  "post_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was made */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of the post (e.g., tweet, Facebook post) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image in the post */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video in the post */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement rate of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., campaign manager, data analyst, social media coordinator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag text */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the hashtag is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_hashtags" (
  "post_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-hashtag mapping */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_hashtags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media post */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., likes, retweets, shares) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_metrics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., total likes, total retweets, total shares) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "influencer_name" TEXT /* Name of the influencer */,
  "influencer_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the influencer */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the influencer */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_influencers" (
  "campaign_influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-influencer mapping */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_influencers_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_influencers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., image, video, text post) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_content" (
  "campaign_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-content mapping */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_content_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_content_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File name of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
